Interface AudioBackend

All Superinterfaces:
Backend
All Known Implementing Classes:
JavaCVBackend, JavaSoundBackend, MinimBackend, NativeAudioBackend, TarsosBackend, VLCJBackend
public interface AudioBackend extends Backend
Universal interface for audio backends (standard, scientific, creative).

Extends Backend to integrate with the standard backend discovery system (BackendDiscovery).

Since:
1.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)

    default Object

    Creates and returns the backend instance (or returns self if it is the backend).

    Returns a description of the backend.

    default String

    Returns the unique identifier for this backend (e.g., "javafx", "jmol", "cuda").

    Returns the display name for UI presentation.

    Returns the current frequency spectrum.
